description_long: This is a rustic log cabin constructed primarily from rounded timber logs, featuring a prominent gabled roof with deep overhangs and a dark shingle finish. The front facade includes a covered porch with wooden railings and steps leading up to the entrance, providing a welcoming entryway. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically placed on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The cabin sits on a slightly raised foundation, with visible support posts beneath the structure. The rear of the cabin is simpler, with a single window and no porch, while the sides display additional windows and log detailing. The overall design evokes a traditional, cozy woodland retreat, suitable for residential use in a suburban or park-like urban setting.
description: A traditional log cabin with a gabled shingle roof, covered front porch, and large rectangular windows, built from rounded timber logs. The structure is raised on posts and features symmetrical window placement and rustic detailing.
description_view_0: The front view shows the covered porch with wooden railings, steps, and two large windows flanking the main entrance.
description_view_1: The rear view reveals a single window centered on the back wall, with no porch or entryway visible.
description_view_2: The left side view displays a single window and the log construction, with part of the porch visible toward the front.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the full front porch, steps, and the main entrance, along with two large front windows.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with deep overhangs and dark asphalt shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple large rectangular windows symmetrically placed on the front and sides, with a single window centered on the rear wall; all windows are vertically oriented and evenly spaced.
attribute_door_placement: Single main door centered on the front facade, accessed via the porch and steps; no other exterior doors visible.
